transcription.text: Let's focus right here and press the button. It's okay. Hey, let's look at the camera. That's it, hold it. Let's get a nice smile. Polaroid's deluxe SX-70 land camera. There's nothing like the kick of seeing your pictures develop in minutes before your eyes. With three SX-70s to choose from and the new little Pronto at $66, why don't you get one for yourself? I just want to take one.

metadata.title: Polaroid Camera Commercial featuring Morgan Freeman 1976
